title: chaeturus fasciculatus subsp. prostratus
side_effects: Chaeturus fasciculatus subsp. prostratus can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing gastrointestinal issues, including nausea and vomiting, due to the toxic compounds present in the plant. Prolonged use can also lead to kidney damage and liver failure, as the plant's chemicals can accumulate in the body and cause severe harm. In severe cases, improper use of Chaeturus fasciculatus subsp. prostratus can even cause seizures and respiratory failure, highlighting the importance of proper handling and caution. It is essential to consult medical professionals before using the plant for health benefits.
